dashboard.heading: Track Savings
dashboard.fixed_savings_desc: Save a bulk amount upfront and lock it in for a fixed term with high interest rates.
dashboard.regular_savings_desc: Save a specific amount periodically (daily, weekly, monthly) toward a target goal.
dashboard.staggered_savings_desc: Save any amount, at any time, with absolute flexibility and no fixed schedule.

create_plan.success: Savings plan created successfully. Awaiting approval by admins.

detail.heading: Savings Plan Detail

early_withdrawal_warning.title: Confirm Early Withdrawal
early_withdrawal_warning.warning_text: Warning: You are requesting a withdrawal before the maturity date. By completing this action, you will forfeit 100% of your accrued interest.

detail.withdrawal_success: Savings withdrawal successful. Funds have been disbursed.

deposit_receipt.title: Upload Deposit Receipt
deposit_receipt.upload_instruction: Drag & drop your proof of payment receipt (JPG, PNG, PDF up to 5MB)
